title: Nifty Carts x Farm & Charm
description: Adds Farm & Charm compatibility for NiftyCarts.
body:
# [NiftyCarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts) x [[Let's Do] Farm & Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm)

[![Requires Farm & Charm](https://github.com/Ninjdai1/CornExpansion/assets/65647523/73e9e3f0-9ca0-411f-b84c-70b19aa5f457)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm)

This is a very simple datapack that adds the seeds from Farm  & Charm to the tags of NiftyCarts which makes it possible to plant seeds from Farm & Charm using the Seed Drill from NiftyCarts.
